center.name: 布罗拉
center.summary: 布罗拉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括红腹滨鹬，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In temperate regions such as the Wadden Sea they have been found to change roost sites each week and their feeding range may be as much as during the course of a week. It is long-lived for a bird of its size; a bird ringed at Brora in northern Scotland as a first-winter in October 1978 (when 3–4 months old) was resighted still alive at Den Helder in the Netherlands in February 2006, 27 years, 3 months, and 29 days after being ringed. Another, tagged "B95" and nicknamed 'Moonbird', of the subspecies C
